name: Raspberry Angel Food
recipeIngredient: 1 Angel Food cake (from mix, scratch, or purchased)
1 cup raspberry sauce, at room temperature
2 cups fresh or unsweetened frozen raspberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a slice of cake on a plate.
2. Add the sliced strawberries to the plate.
3. Pour the raspberry sauce over the top of the cake and berries.
4. Do not add sugar to the berries, as the sauce will sweeten them.
Raspberry Sauce (serves 6)
1. In a small heavy saucepan, combine the raspberries and sugar.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, mashing the berries as they cook.
3. Dissolve the cornstarch in water and stir into the mixture until thickened (about 1 minute).
4. Strain through a sieve to remove seeds (optional).
5. Stir in Chambord if desired.
6. Allow sauce to cool before serving either chilled or at room temperature.
Note: This recipe can be easily doubled or tripled, yielding approximately 13 calories per tablespoon with no protein, fat, or cholesterol content.
